zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Fillongley於1270年出生在英國瓦維其可爾費隆格利時，她的父親Alain de Fillongley I22歲，母親Isabel Roos20歲。她於1292年之前與Nicholas de Hastings在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1322年在她的家鄉享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Fillongley于1270年出生在英国瓦維其可爾費隆格利时，她的父亲Alain de Fillongley I22岁，母亲Isabel Roos20岁。她于1292年之前与Nicholas de Hastings在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1322年在她的家乡享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Fillongley was born in 1270, in Fillongley, Warwickshire, England, her father, Alain de Fillongley I, was 22 and her mother, Isabel Roos, was 20. She married Nicholas de Hastings before 1292, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1322, in her hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Fillongley est née en 1270, à Fillongley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Alain de Fillongley I, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Isabel Roos, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas de Hastings avant 1292, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1322, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Fillongley 1270 in Fillongley, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alain de Fillongley I 22 und ihre Mutter Isabel Roos 20. Sie hat vor 1292 in England Nicholas de Hastings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1322 im Alter von 52 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Fillongley è nata il nel 1270 nel Fillongley, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Alain de Fillongley I, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Isabel Roos, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas de Hastings prima del 1292, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1322, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Fillongleyが1270年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアフィロングリーで生まれた時，父Alain de Fillongley Iは22歳，母Isabel Roosは20歳であった。1292年以前にイギリスでNicholas de Hastingsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1322年に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Fillongley(이)가 1270년 영국 워윅실르 피론글리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alain de Fillongley I(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Roos(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1292년 이전 영국에서 Nicholas de Hastings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1322년 그녀의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Fillongley nasceu em 1270, em Fillongley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alain de Fillongley I, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Roos, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas de Hastings antes 1292, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1322, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Fillongley родилась в 1270 г. в местности филлонгли, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Alain de Fillongley I было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Roos, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas de Hastings перед 1292 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1322 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Fillongley nació en 1270, en Fillongley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Alain de Fillongley I, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Isabel Roos, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Nicholas de Hastings antes de 1292, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1322, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años.
